zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Montague於大約1384年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親John de Montagu35歲，母親Maud Francis23歲。她於1419年與Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1457年11月27日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦瓦波三。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Montague于大约1384年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，她的父亲John de Montagu35岁，母亲Maud Francis23岁。她于1419年与Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1457年11月27日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦瓦波三。

nameMeanings.name: Montague
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: McTigue
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Taidhg, ‘son of Tadhg’, a personal name originally meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’. Compare McCaig .

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Montague was born about 1384, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, John de Montagu, was 35 and her mother, Maud Francis, was 23. She married Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire in 1419, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 27 November 1457, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Wapping, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Montague est née environ 1384, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Montagu, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Maud Francis, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire en 1419, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 novembre 1457, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Wapping, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.West Horndon, Essex, England, United Kin: West Horndon, Essex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Montague um 1384 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Montagu 35 und ihre Mutter Maud Francis 23. Sie hat 1419 in England, United Kingdom Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. November 1457 im Alter von 74 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Wapping, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Montague è nata il circa 1384 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, John de Montagu, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Maud Francis, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire nel 1419, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 novembre 1457, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Wapping, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Montagueが約1384年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父John de Montaguは35歳，母Maud Francisは23歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリスでSir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1457年11月27日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンワップイングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Montague(이)가 대략 1384년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Montagu(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Francis(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1457년 11월 27일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 왑핀그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Montague nasceu aproximadamente 1384, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Montagu, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Maud Francis, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire em 1419, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1457, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Wapping, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.West Horndon, Essex, England, United Kin: West Horndon, Essex, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Montague родилась около 1384 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Montagu было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Francis, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire в 1419 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 27 ноября 1457 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности ваппинг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Montague nació aproximadamente 1384, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Montagu, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Maud Francis, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir John FitzLewis MP - Sheriff of Essex and Hertfordshire en 1419, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de noviembre de 1457, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Wapping, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
